description: Monthly services fee must not exceed $15,000 per calendar month.

clause_ref.text: Customer shall pay Vendor a monthly services fee not to exceed Fifteen Thousand U.S. Dollars ($15,000) per calendar month for analytics support.

description: Every invoice must reference a valid Harbor purchase order.

clause_ref.text: Vendor shall reference a valid Harbor purchase order number on every invoice submitted for payment.

description: Invoices must fall within the contract term of 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31.

clause_ref.text: This Agreement is effective January 1, 2025 and expires December 31, 2025, unless earlier terminated per Section 8.

description: Vendor must not submit duplicate invoices for the same billing period or invoice number.

clause_ref.text: Vendor shall not submit duplicate invoices for the same billing period or invoice number.
